app.description: Free-text surface description, e.g. 'Codex app' vs 'Codex CLI in VS Code'

session_id.description: VERIFIED runtime-instance ID only (read from own store/env). Never model-guessed. Identifies a runtime session, NOT the logical conversation.

session_hint.description: Unverified environmental leaks (path UUIDs, sandbox aliases, prior runtime IDs). Ingest-time tiebreakers only.

conversation_url.description: Human-pasted address-bar URL. ChatGPT /c/<id> and Claude /chat/<uuid> parse to the IDs used in official exports.

workspace.description: cwd / repo path for agent surfaces

note.description: One-sentence human-readable summary: what this session is about / where it left off

marker.description: Short random token; for agent-writers usually the hex suffix of the filename (write-echo join)
